body: RelayListener is working. Fixes applied: (1) pwsh.exe uses MSI path with WindowsApps fallback; (2) RepetitionDuration set to empty string for indefinite repeat (not TimeSpan::MaxValue); (3) -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass added to task args; (4) Unblock-File applied to relay-listener.ps1 before registration; (5) Register-ScheduledTask wrapped in try/catch. Task state: Ready, LastTaskResult: 0. Cold-start launch logic is correct — listener skips when node/claude already running, will open new window on next tick when Claude is not running.
